name: ultraprompt
description: Ultraprompt V8.9 cognitive control-plane plugin for Claude Code and Codex: 55 skills, 34 agents, 42 MCP tools, 33 commands, typed local memory, safe dream jobs, governed learning, workflow pathfinding, capability graph, live Mission Control dashboard, evidence-led release gates, dual-runtime install. V8.8 hardens the plugin (description lint, read-only enforcement via disallowedTools, protected-file-guard, mojibake fix, catalog templating, CI gate). V8.9 adds incident-response, adr-author, runbook-author, cost-audit, git-workflow, onboarding-doc skills; incident-commander, prompt-engineer, release-manager, data-analyst agents; /ultraprompt:dispatch and /ultraprompt:rollback commands.
